commit.message:
Fix fabric scale: tile 6x6 for yard-cut view, remove forced pattern enlargement

The macro close-up swatch photos show thread-level detail (e.g. Echo Silver
micro-chevron at 2-3mm per V). Previous 3x3 tiling + prompt forcing "clearly
legible geometric patterns" caused OpenAI to enlarge micro-patterns into bold
shapes that don't match the real fabric.

Changes:
- Tile swatch 6x6 (was 3x3) → each tile ~256px at 1536px output, simulating
  approximately how a yard of fabric looks from normal viewing distance
- Remove forced pattern scale ("8-14 inches per repeat") from prompt
- New prompt tells OpenAI the tiled image represents a yard-cut view and to
  preserve the TRUE scale — micro textures stay micro, bold patterns stay bold

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[A6] Phase 4 Planning: Active-Active Failover & HA Architecture

**Status:** Planning phase complete, ready for implementation

**Overview:**
Phase 4 introduces competitive-differentiating active-active failover and HA features:
- Quorum-based write coordination across sites
- Anti-entropy read-repair with divergence detection
- Vector clocks for causal consistency
- High-level HA orchestration enabling true dual-site writes

**Deliverables:**
- docs/replication-phase4.md: Comprehensive design document
- a6-phase4-input.md: OpenCode implementation prompt (ready to execute)
- CHANGELOG updated with Phase 4 details

**Phase 4 Modules (planned):**
1. write_aware_quorum.rs (22-26 tests) — Quorum voting logic
2. read_repair_coordinator.rs (20-24 tests) — Dynamo-style anti-entropy
3. vector_clock_replication.rs (18-22 tests) — Causal consistency
4. dual_site_orchestrator.rs (24-28 tests) — HA orchestration
5. dual_site_metrics.rs (14-18 tests, optional) — Health monitoring

**Target:** 280-320 new tests, 878 → ~1158 total tests

**Next:** Execute OpenCode generation to implement all 4-5 modules

**Current Baseline:** 45 modules, 878 tests, all passing (Phase 3 complete)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Mobile responsiveness overhaul: touch support, responsive widths, text sizes across 20 views

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Exempt iframe sub-resources (site_libs) from auth

Quarto HTML pages loaded in iframes reference CSS/JS from site_libs/
via normal <script>/<link> tags. The browser can't inject Authorization
headers on these, causing 401s on the published Fly deployment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: auto-match normalizer against all config patterns, fix competitor count

The normalizer only handled ~40 hardcoded names, so Fed District banks,
local banks, and CU variants like "CITIZENS BANK ONLINE" were never
rolled up. Now uses two-layer matching:

1. Manual overrides (ALLY FINANCIAL -> ALLY BANK, etc.)
2. Auto-match against ALL starts_with patterns in COMPETITOR_MERCHANTS
   (longest match wins, so "CHASE BANK" beats "CHASE")

Also fixes cell 02 to count/group by normalized competitor_match instead
of raw merchant_consolidated -- this was causing the 50k+ competitor count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix pkill command in CLAUDE.md dev loop

Must use `pkill -f uvicorn` (matches full command line) not `pkill uvicorn`
(matches process name only) — server runs as /usr/bin/python so bare pkill misses it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: keep blank values when parsing Twilio webhook params for signature validation

Twilio includes empty-value params (ToZip=, CallerZip=, etc.) in its HMAC
signature computation. parse_qsl without keep_blank_values=True drops them,
causing a signature mismatch.

commit.message:
Fix: skip Pinecone for conversational fillers (yes, ok, dale, claro, etc.)

RAG noise was causing the agent to repeat itself when users responded with
short affirmative tokens. Skip retrieval entirely for known fillers so the
model answers from conversation history and system prompt instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 3: convention-over-configuration data architecture + RSS feed

Eliminate manifest.json. Data discovery now uses auto-generated index
files (data/days/index.json, data/summaries/index.json) with content-
based cache-busting hashes. One consolidated file per day replaces
multi-file splits (day5-update, day5-late, etc). Summaries split from
monolithic file into per-day files. New pipeline tool
(scripts/generate-indexes.py) regenerates all indexes, watch-current
state, and RSS feed from folder contents. Zero data loss — 160 entries
verified across old and new structures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: realistic parallax intro + GitHub Actions CI/CD deploy to Hostinger

CinematicIntro.tsx:
- NebulaCanvas: 5 animated radial gradient blobs, counter-parallax with mouse
- CameraRig: Three.js camera tilts with mouse (lerp 0.04, ±2.8° X, ±1.8° Y)
- Mouse tracking: RAF lerp loop, normalized -1..1, updates all layers
- 3-layer CSS parallax: nebula (-14px/-9px), mid fog (+6px/+4px), title (+22px/+14px)
- Star trail enhancement: PointsMaterial size 1.4→2.8 during approach phase
- Title glassmorphism card: backdrop-blur-xl + layered box-shadow + inset border
- 3D CSS tilt: perspective(1200px) rotateY/X driven by mouse position
- Depth vignette: radial gradient overlay for cinematic depth feel

.github/workflows/deploy.yml:
- Triggers on push to main + manual dispatch
- Build job: Node 20, npm ci, next build with all secrets
- Deploy job: SSH to Hostinger VPS, git pull + npm ci + build + pm2 restart
- Slack notifications on success and failure
- Concurrency guard prevents overlapping deploys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add phase guard to MapGameViewModel.nextRound() to prevent double invocation

When the user presses the Continue button, nextRound() is called by the
button handler, and then again by ModalBottomSheet's onDismissRequest
after the dismiss animation completes. Without a phase guard, the second
call advances the game an extra round. ClassicGameViewModel already had
this guard; this commit adds the same check to MapGameViewModel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

(MemoryPressure, HighLoad, DiskPressure) and agent drain/cordon
lifecycle with append-only timeline events.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add drain detection and timeline to agent responses

- Agent detects drain flag on heartbeat, transitions state
- writeRegistration includes State field
- GetAgent returns timeline events and conditions/state
- agentInfoFromRegistration maps conditions and state
- Full test coverage for drain detection and timeline

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(cli): add drain/undrain commands and conditions display

Add agent drain/undrain subcommands with --hostname flag. Extend agent
list with CONDITIONS column showing active conditions. Extend agent get
with conditions table, state display, and timeline table.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add agent lifecycle feature docs and update permissions

Add agent-lifecycle.md feature page covering node conditions and
drain/cordon. Add drain/undrain CLI docs. Update agent list/get docs
with conditions and timeline. Add agent:write to permissions tables.
Add conditions config to configuration reference. Update README,
navbar dropdown, and system architecture.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style: fix goimports formatting in condition_test.go

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use available memory (free + cached) for MemoryPressure

On macOS and Linux, "free" memory is tiny because the OS uses RAM for
file cache. Using Total - Free overstates pressure. Available memory
(Free + Cached) is reclaimable and better reflects actual pressure.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use gopsutil Available for MemoryPressure calculation

gopsutil does not populate Cached on macOS (it's always 0), so
Free + Cached was identical to Free — causing false 96% pressure
on machines with plenty of reclaimable memory. Use the Available
field instead, which gopsutil computes correctly per-platform.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(agent): wire consumer stop/start for drain/undrain

On drain, cancel the consumer context and wait for all consumer
goroutines to exit — the agent stops receiving new jobs from NATS.
On undrain, create a new consumer context and restart all consumers.
Consumers use a separate WaitGroup from heartbeat/facts so drain
only affects job delivery.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(state): add agent-state KV bucket for persistent drain state

Move drain flags and timeline events from ephemeral buckets
(job-queue 1h TTL, agent-registry 30s TTL) to a dedicated
agent-state KV bucket with no TTL. This ensures operator
drain/undrain actions and state transition history persist
indefinitely. Add tests for drain flag operations and state
filtering in CountExpectedAgents.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: add one-suite-method-per-function test rule

Clarify that all scenarios for a function (success, errors, edge cases)
belong as rows in a single table-driven test — never split into separate
TestFoo, TestFooError, TestFooNilResponse methods.

* style: fix long lines in subjects_public_test.go

Rebuild personal finance tracker from scratch

Full-stack app with React+Vite frontend, Express+TypeScript backend,

commit.message:
fix: VMess inbound 共享缓冲区数据竞争 + Trojan outbound 请求头竞态

VMess inbound (VMessServerAsyncStream):
- 根因：shared_crypto_buf_ 被读写方向共用，relay 中 cobalt::gather
  并发执行读写，ReadFull 在 co_await 挂起时 Encrypt 覆写同一块内存，
  导致解密失败和数据损坏
- 修复：恢复读写独立缓冲区（read_crypto_buf_/read_spare_buf_ +
  write_crypto_buf_/write_output_buf_）

Trojan outbound (TrojanClientStream):
- 根因：AsyncRead 和 AsyncWrite 都检查 request_sent_ 标志，
  并发下两个协程可能同时进入请求头发送路径，导致发送两次
- 修复：在第一个 co_await 前立即设置 request_sent_ = true
